title: Trapped in a kill zone for 177 days, his wife’s voice was his lifeline
summary_full: While Roman Mongold, a Ukrainian soldier, was pinned down and surrounded by the enemy, he managed to trade voice memos with his wife thanks to a commander’s help.
summary_public: While Roman Mongold, a Ukrainian soldier, was pinned down and surrounded by the enemy, he managed to trade voice memos with his wife thanks to a commander’s help.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: a Ukrainian soldier, was pinned down and surrounded by the enemy
